title: armeria maritima subsp. interior
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. interior is a subspecies of the sea pink plant, which is a perennial herb that grows in coastal areas and produces white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and it is known to have a range of medicinal properties, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Armeria maritima subsp. interior include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the flowers or leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
